steps.title: Pokedex Ts Causal Operation Trace · changed case

Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile bounded causal telemetry, percentile latency, event-loop responsiveness, cache value, and capacity; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use budget must remain enforced; then change one catch, owned record, export, location relation, or history transition without mutating prior state.
